title: Keurig Dr Pepper Inc. (KDP) CEO Ozan Dokmecioglu on Q3 2022 Results - Earnings Call Transcript
text: Keurig Dr Pepper Inc. (NASDAQ:KDP ) Q3 2022 Earnings Conference Call October 27, 2022 8:00 AM ET Company Participants Steve Alexander - VP of IR Ozan Dokmecioglu - CEO George Lagoudakis - Interim CFO Bob Gamgort - Executive Chairman Maria Sceppaguercio - Chief Corporate Affairs Officer Conference Call Participants Bryan Spillane - Bank of America Lauren Lieberman - Barclays Nik Modi - RBC Capital Markets Chris Carey - Wells Fargo Securities Bonnie Herzog - Goldman Sachs Brett Cooper - Consumer Edge Research Andrea Teixeira - JP Morgan Operator Good morning, ladies and gentlemen, and thank you for standing by. Welcome to the Keurig Dr Pepper's Earnings Call for the Third Quarter of 2022.

title: Keurig Dr. Pepper stock falls after third-quarter profit falls sharply amid inflationary pressures
text: Keurig Dr. Pepper Inc.'s stock fell before market open on Thursday after the company's third-quarter earnings fell sharply from the year-earlier as inflationary pressures weighed.

title: What To Expect From Keurig Dr Pepper's Q3?
text: Our high-quality portfolio and multi-strategy portfolio have beaten the market consistently since the end of 2016.

title: Will Pricing Aid Keurig's (KDP) Q3 Earnings Amid Cost Woes?
text: A recovery in the supply chain of coffee and non-carbonated beverages, pricing gains to mitigate inflation, and continued portfolio growth are likely to aid Keurig's (KDP) Q3 results amid cost woes.

title: Keurig Dr Pepper: Strong Market Position And Upside Potential
text: Keurig Dr Pepper continues to show revenue growth despite unfavorable macro headwinds. Leading positions in the market and economies of scale make it possible to most effectively manage the growth of operating costs.

title: Keurig Dr Pepper overhauls supply chain, names Roger Johnson chief supply chain officer
text: Keurig Dr Pepper Inc. KDP, +0.43% said Thursday it is overhauling its supply chain structure with a view to improving accountability at the business unit level and accelerating productivity across the company. The beverages company said it's promoted three senior supply chain leaders into new roles.

title: Three Dividend Growers the Institutions Are Buying
text: The institutions are buying these three well-positioned dividend growth stocks despite (or because of) headwinds and risks to the economy.

title: Wedbush assigns outperform ratings to Keurig Dr Pepper, Coca-Cola and Pepsi
text: Wedbush on Tuesday initiated overage of five non-alcoholic beverage companies including Keurig Dr Pepper  KDP, +1.29% , The Coca-Cola Company  KO, -0.22% , PepsiCo  PEP, +0.13% , Monster Beverage Corp  MNST, +0.81% ,  and Celsius Holdings  CELH, +4.29% . Wedbush said Keurig Dr Pepper is its top pick, with an outperform rating and a price target of $43 a share.

title: Does Keurig Dr Pepper Stock Have More Upside?
text: Keurig Dr Pepper stock (NYSE: KDP) has seen a 0% rise this year, significantly outperforming the broader S&P500 index, down 23%.

title: 7 Nasdaq Sleeper Stocks to Buy Before Wall Street Wakes Up
text: The search for Nasdaq sleeper stocks to buy remains one many aggressive investors are on. However, at first glance, this search is one that seems incredibly risky.
